title: LangGraph evaluations fail with 'the connection is closed'
description: Observed feedback evaluation b8ba30b0-9083-4051-bbb6-ace554994fa4 failing after 58/200 items with score result value ERROR and error 'the connection is closed' from LangGraphScore Classifier model.ainvoke. Agent Misrepresentation has been stable for days; this started surfacing once ERROR became fatal. Fix: add narrow retry for transient closed-connection exceptions around model.ainvoke in Classifier node; and include exception type + short details in ERROR Score.Result for transparency. Acceptance: evaluation no longer fails due to a single transient closed-connection error; if retries still exhaust, dashboard/task/eval error includes exception type and message.
